command:
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 jose@192.168.0.202 bash << 'REMOTE'
echo "=== Webhook registered? ==="
curl -s "https://api.telegram.org/bot8849049212:AAH2CHM_CDLDeTLfVxw7UGz5aO1weVBdnpw/getWebhookInfo" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); r=d.get('result',{}); print('url:', r.get('url')); print('pending:', r.get('pending_update_count')); print('last_error:', r.get('last_error_message'))"

echo "=== Public URL health ==="
curl -sk -o /dev/null -w "sakura.cutegrafiks.com: %{http_code}\n" --max-time 10 https://sakura.cutegrafiks.com/ 2>/dev/null

echo "=== Send LIVE test message to group ==="
curl -s -X POST "https://api.telegram.org/bot8849049212:AAH2CHM_CDLDeTLfVxw7UGz5aO1weVBdnpw/sendMessage" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"chat_id":"-1003934415467","text":"Sakura-chan, are you back online? Say hi!"}' | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print('test msg sent:', d.get('ok'), 'id:', d.get('result',{}).get('message_id'))"

echo "Waiting 25s for Sakura to process and respond..."
sleep 25

echo "=== Hermes log (look for message received + response) ==="
tail -30 /tmp/hermes.log
REMOTE
